name: Huỳnh Mai Cao Nhân
summary: I am a software engineer driven by a relentless focus on performance and system excellence. Code is my tool; data structures and algorithms are my philosophy. I refine every solution for maximum efficiency, scalability, and resilience. System design is where I build robust, adaptable infrastructures. I don't aim for competence — I strive for mastery, crafting world-class systems with precision and intent.

seo.title: Huỳnh Mai Cao Nhân | Software Engineer
seo.description: Backend-focused software engineer specializing in distributed systems, microservices, and high-performance applications.
